text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to train, but Grass Wonder is nowhere to
be seen. I go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. Have a look at this book.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's such a popular title, it rarely stays on the shelf
at the library, but I finally managed to borrow a
copy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's a lovely piece of literature thoroughly
explaining the roots of Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It even includes seasonal pictures of places which
haven't lost their beauty even after a
millennium. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to see them as well, Trainer?
You're sure to find one to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh! I-I'm so sorry. How could I be so careless?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It completely slipped my mind. I promise to be
more attentive in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems genuinely sorry, so I give her the day
off.
